steps.clue: Use Klaus and the CRBR-S Blazer to open the hidden lab.
Charge and return the three essence canisters.
Stop the train with Klaus and retrieve the warhead and keycard.
Build Klaus's hacking helm and unlock the Dimensional Disruptor.
Craft both uranium devices, collide them on the zipline, then repeat next round.
Place both cleansed rocks in the lab and defeat Valentina.
Protect Klaus while he carries the warhead through the portal.
